content: Self-Refine’s single-perspective iterative refinement framework can be augmented by integrating multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from modern LLM self-reflection mechanisms to create a hybrid self-improvement pipeline that retains Self-Refine’s advantage of no extra training or supervision while mitigating its bias toward local optima. This hybrid approach lets LLMs catch flawed assumptions that a single self-feedback loop would miss, without sacrificing the simplicity that makes Self-Refine appealing for edge deployments.
